mapper.select: SELECT b.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, vnd.vendor_nm AS vendor_nm, brd.brand_nm AS brand_nm, cd_vbc.code_label AS contract_cd_nm FROM sy_vendor_brand b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_vendor vnd ON vnd.vendor_id = b.vendor_id LEFT JOIN sy_brand brd ON brd.brand_id = b.brand_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vbc ON cd_vbc.code_grp = 'VENDOR_BRAND_CONTRACT' AND cd_vbc.code_value = b.contract_cd WHERE b.vendor_brand_id = #{id}
